_comment: This shows the INTERMEDIATE steps of the pipeline — what happens between input and output. This helps you understand the data flow.

step_1_llm_parse_output._description: llm_parser.py extracts this from the job posting text (ParsedJobPosting model)
step_1_llm_parse_output._NOTE: target_titles and department are EXTRACTED but NEVER USED downstream — this is the main problem to fix!

step_2_domain_discovery._description: pipeline.py finds the company domain through multiple strategies

step_3_candidate_collection._description: Candidates are collected from multiple sources with different trust levels

step_4_ai_validation_and_ranking._description: ai_validator.py scores candidates — THIS IS WHERE THE PROBLEM IS

_ideal_scoring_for_IT_job.CTO/IT-Leiter (matches job): 100 points (should be highest for IT jobs!)

current_result.name: Sandra Klein
current_result._why: HR Manager → always gets 100 in current system

ideal_result.name: Markus Wagner
ideal_result._why: CTO matches IT job → should be highest!

ideal_result.name: Sandra Klein
ideal_result._why: HR Manager → good fallback, but not #1 for IT job

step_5_linkedin_verification._description: Top candidates are verified via LinkedIn/Apify (checks if they still work at the company)

step_6_phone_enrichment._description: Phone numbers are found via BetterContact/FullEnrich/Kaspr APIs — NOT part of your task
